text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right before summer camp ends, I'm looking for
Nice Nature, when...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I won't be able to see this for a while...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: And I wanted to reflect on some stuff.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm... stronger than I was before summer camp,
right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't just being by the sea make you
emotional? There's a reason it's a primo date
spot.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess I'll go back. I've got my mind all
ready now.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ready for the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Nice Nature's summer camp comes
to an end.
